name: Cloudflare WAF list availability
line_filters: ^\| Max\. number of list items \(across all custom lists\) \|
^\* The number of available custom lists depends on the highest plan in your account\.
expected_lines: | Max. number of list items (across all custom lists) | 10,000 | 10,000 | 10,000 | 500,000 |
| IP lists | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
* The number of available custom lists depends on the highest plan in your account. Any account with at least one paid plan will get the highest quota.
reminders: Re-check whether the WAF list config comment about managing only a small number of lists is still justified.
Re-check any user guidance that assumes Free accounts only get one custom list.
Re-check whether IP lists remain available on all plans and whether account-level item caps changed.
